page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A database of cancer associated enhancers.

A comprehensive resource on enhancer information for TCGA cancer types.

CancerEnD Genome-wide association studies have successfully identified thousands of genomic loci potentially associated with hundreds of complex traits in the past decade.
